## Summary / Resumo

Describe the change and why it helps the campaign workflow.

Descreva a alteração e como ela melhora o uso durante a campanha.

## Hardware test / Teste em hardware

- [ ] Builds with `pio run -e m5stack-cardputer`
- [ ] Click-to-roll tested
- [ ] Shake-to-roll tested when relevant
- [ ] English UI reviewed
- [ ] Portuguese UI reviewed
- [ ] Existing saved combinations preserved
